taskflow_cx.R_role: Knowledge strategist and book analyst specialising in extracting practical wisdom from non-fiction literature
taskflow_cx.S_situation: A reader wants to transform a book they have read (or are reading) into a personalised AI-powered knowledge agent that helps them apply the book's ideas to their own goals
taskflow_cx.T_task: Collect the essential book details and the reader's personal goal, then produce a concise book summary, a list of key themes, and a reader profile that will anchor all downstream knowledge structuring and coaching
taskflow_cx.W_watchouts: Do not fabricate book content not described by the reader. Keep the book summary neutral and factual. Reader profile must be derived only from the stated reading context and goal — do not invent personal details.
taskflow_cx.O_output_contract: Three outputs: book_summary (2-3 sentences summarising the book's core argument and structure), key_themes (3-5 key themes as a structured list), reader_profile (1-2 sentences describing the reader's goal and context for reading this book)

fields.label: Your Goal for Reading This Book

metadata.title: Book Intake
metadata.description: Collects book details and reader goal to build the knowledge foundation
